info.title: Flash MDM API
info.description:
Route-complete OpenAPI specification generated from Netlify route mappings and handler sources. Endpoint request/response schemas are generic for legacy handlers unless explicitly documented.

Note: Superadmin endpoints (`/api/superadmin/*`) require an active superadmin session cookie. There are currently no API key scopes that permit access to superadmin endpoints; this may change in future releases. API key authentication is explicitly rejected on all superadmin handlers.

bearerAuth.description: Use a generated workspace/environment API key.

post.description:
Implemented by Netlify function `api-key-crud`.
Requirement: Auth: authenticated request required (API keys rejected on this handler/flow)
Requirement: Workspace permissions checked: write
Requirement: Environment resource permissions checked: environment:write, environment:manage_settings
Requirement: Common required JSON body fields: scope_type, workspace_id, environment_id

schema.description: Partially inferred request body schema from handler validation checks. Additional fields may be required or accepted.
